title: Find My Device - Stop button
scenario: Find My Device Stop button does not stop the tone or re-enable the Play button after starting a tone
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Tap the blue Geo icon (Find My Device) next to the connected device name.
Tap the Play button to start the tone on the device.
While the tone is playing, tap the Stop button.
expected: The tone stops playing immediately, and the Play button becomes available again (i.e., the Stop button is no longer shown, and the Play button is tappable).
